summary: Completed comprehensive testing of StreamVault iteration 2 features. All 24 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: LiveKit token generation, WebSocket chat, VOD system, notifications, 5 subscription tiers ($4.99-$100), and stream key display fix.

integration_issues.issue: LiveKit WebSocket connection fails with 401 - expected since LiveKit URL is placeholder (wss://streamvault.livekit.cloud)
integration_issues.priority: INFO - Expected behavior with placeholder URL

passed_tests: Backend API Tests (24/24 passed):
- Authentication: demo user login, admin login, /auth/me with stream_key
- LiveKit tokens: viewer token generation, streamer token generation, validation
- Subscription tiers: 5 tiers returned ($4.99, $9.99, $24.99, $49.99, $100)
- Notifications: get notifications, unread count, mark all read
- VODs: get VODs list, get user VODs
- Streams: get live streams, get stream by ID, get stream chat
- Follow system: follow user creates notification
- Categories, Search, Featured content, My stream, Subscription status
Frontend Tests (all passed):
- Homepage loads with hero, live streams (4 cards), categories
- VODs link visible in sidebar
- Login with progamer@demo.com / Demo123! works
- Notification bell shows in header when logged in
- Dashboard shows stats (followers, donations, subscribers, stream status)
- Dashboard shows stream key (sk_f2685118...) in Stream Key section
- Stream key copy button present and functional
- Stream page shows video player, chat box, donate button, subscribe button
- WebSocket chat connects successfully
- Subscription dialog shows all 5 tiers with correct prices
- VODs page accessible with past streams
- Browse page with Live Streams and Categories tabs working
critical_code_review_comments: LiveKit URL (wss://streamvault.livekit.cloud) is a placeholder - actual video streaming won't work until real LiveKit credentials are configured
Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby warning in subscription dialog (accessibility improvement)
seed_data_creation: Demo streamers (progamer, musicqueen, chatmaster) with live streams auto-seeded on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features verified working: LiveKit token APIs, WebSocket chat, VOD system, notifications, 5 subscription tiers, stream key display. LiveKit video won't stream (placeholder URL) but token generation works. Previous iteration 1 tests still valid. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_streamvault_v2.py covers all new endpoints.

livekit_tokens.note: Tokens generate correctly, actual video streaming requires real LiveKit URL

websocket_chat.note: Chat WebSocket connects and messages display
